verses.1: The LORD is my light and my salvation.
verses.2: When evildoers came at me to eat up my flesh,
verses.3: Though an army should encamp against me,
verses.4: One thing I have asked of the LORD, that I will seek after:
verses.5: For in the day of trouble, he will keep me secretly in his pavilion.
verses.6: Now my head will be lifted up above my enemies around me.
verses.7: Hear, LORD, when I cry with my voice.
verses.9: Don’t hide your face from me.
verses.10: When my father and my mother forsake me,
verses.12: Don’t deliver me over to the desire of my adversaries,
verses.13: I am still confident of this:
